/CAL:HEARING ON DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS/ /DAWT/CONTD:TO SET DEFENSE MOTION TO DISMISS (KASTIGAR & TROMBETTA)/DAWF/VD:DEF MOTION TO DISMISS (KASTIGAR & TROMBETTA) ON 01-25-19/

/CAL: MOTION TO DISMISS AS PER TROMBETTA/X: THE PEOPLE REQUEST MORE TIME TO FILE AN OPPOSITION,'/CONTD: HEARING ON MOTION TO DISMISS AS PER TROMBETTA/CTORD: THE PEOPLE'S OPPOSITIOIN IS DUE ON 01-11-19, ANY REPLY TO THE OPPOSITION IS DUE 01-22-19/X: IF NECESSARY, THE OPPOSITION AND REPLIES MAY BEIN EXCESS OF 15 PAGES,/DAWF/

/CAL:DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE/DAWT/X:DEFENSE ORALLY JOINS ORDER REGARDING COMPLIANCE WITH JANUARY 19, 2017 ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR DISCOVERY FILED AND SIGNED IN COURT TODAY/X:THE COURT REQUESTS FOR BOTH PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER ABOUT FINDING A INDEPENDENT PERSON TO SEARCH & IMAGE THESERVER AND HARD DRIVE AND TO PREPARE SEALED DISCOVERY TO BE REVIEWED BY THEJUDGE/ /CONTD:STATUS OF DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE/DAWF/X:THE COURT ORDERS MARKNICCO OR REPRESENTATIVE FROM THE SHERIFF'S LEGAL TEAM TO BE PRESENT AT THENEXT COURT DATE/

/CAL:FURTHER STATUS OF DISCOVERY/DAWT/X:FREYA HORNE APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/X:THE PEOPLE HAVE ACCEPTED RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS FROM THE SHERIFF'S DEPT AND WILL TURN THEM OVER TO DEFENSE COUNSEL AFTER REVIEW,/CONTD:03-09-2017 AT 1330 IN DEPT M17 FOR COMPLIANCE WITHDISCOVERY/DAWF/

/CAL: STATUS OF DISCOVERY/X: FREYA HORNE APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE SF SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/X: THE COURT AND THE PEOPLE MAKE THEIR RECORD AS TO THE RESULTS OF THE IN CAMERA REVIEW OF THE EVIDENCE MATERIALS IN QUESTION,/CONTD: FURTHER STATUS OF DISCOVERY/

/CAL: STATUS OF DISCOVERY/X: WITH DA KELLY BURKE, LT MATT IRVINE AND SNR INSPECTOR MIKE KLOSS PRESENT, THE COURT CONDUCTS AN IN CAMERA REVIEW OF DISCOVERY MATERIALS,/X: THE COURT TAKES POSSESSION OF TWO BOXES OF RECORDS INORDER TO CONDUCT ITS REVIEW,/CTORD: THE TRANSCRIPT OF THESE PROCEEDINGS ISORDERED FILED UNDER SEAL/CONTD: STATUS OF DISCOVERY/DAWF/
/CAL: STATUS OF DISCOVERY/DAWT/X: THE COURT SIGNS THE DEFENSE ORDER TO COMPEL DISCOVERY, STAYING PARAGRAPH ONE UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT,/CONTD: FURTHER STATUS OF DISCOVERY/

/CAL:DISCOVERY MOTION/DAWT/X:FREYA HORNE SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE SF SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/X:NICOLE PIFARI SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT//X:SENIOR DEPUTY VINCENT CHEW CONTINUES HIS TESTIMONY AND REMAINS UNDER OATH/WIT SWORN: LT, MATT IRVINE, SFDA/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT ORDERS THE PERSONAL FILES OBTAINED BY THE PROSECUTION TO BE DISTRIBUTED TO EACH DEFENDANT RESPECTIVELY,  EACH DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE THEIR OWN RECORDS ONLY, DISCOVERYWILL BE PROVIDED TO EACH DEFENDANT AFTER A PROTECTIVE ORDER AND REVIEWED BY THE JUDGE/CONTD:STATUS OF DISCOVERY/

/CAL:DISCOVERY MOTION/ /DAWT/X:NICOLE PIFARI SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT/X:FREYA HORNE SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/WITEXCL:THE PEOPLE/WIT SWORN: LT,CHARLES FLEWELLLEN, SFSD/WIT SWORN: LT,DAVID MURPHY, SFSD/WIT SWORN: SR, DEPUTY VINCENT CHEW/X:WITNESS SENIOR DEPUTY VINCENT CHEW WAS ADMONISHED AND ORDERED TO RETURN TO TESTIFY AT NEXT COURT DATE/ /X:WITNESS SENIOR INSPECTOR WAS ADMONISHED AND ORDERED TO RETURN TO  TESTIFY AT NEXT COURT DATE/CONT/DAWF/

/CAL: DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE/DAWT/X: RANI WAGNER APPEARS FOR THE SFPD,/X:FREYA HORNE APPEARS FOR THE SFSD,/X: THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT WILL WITHDRAW ITS MOTION TO QUASH,/CTORD: SUBPOENAED RECORDS ARE RELEASED TO THE DEFENSE FOR COPYING AND DISTRIBUTION,/X: THIS DEFENDANT ENTERED A GENERAL TIMEWAIVER ON 04-25-16,/CGTW/VD: HEARING DATES OF 05-16-16 AND 05-23-16/CONTD: DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE, SFPD'S MOTION TO QUASH AND DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE/
